prompt: Color each letter sequentially with the four pane colors.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the 'Microsoft' text. Color each letter sequentially using the colors from the four panes in image 2. The sequence of colors, derived from image 2, should be: red (top-left pane), green (top-right pane), blue (bottom-left pane), and yellow (bottom-right pane), repeating this cycle for all letters.
